title: A note on the $L^{p}$-solvability of a strongly-coupled nonlocal system of equations
summary:
The goal of this paper is to study the $L^p$-solvability of the strongly-coupled nonlocal system \[
  \mathbb{L} \mathbf{u} (\mathbf{x}) + λ\mathbf{u}(\mathbf{x})= \mathbf{f}(\mathbf{x}) \quad \text{in $\mathbb{R}^{d}$ } \] where $\mathbb{L}$ is a linear nonlocal coupled vector-valued operator associated with a kernel $K$ comparable to $|\mathbf{y}|^{-(d+2s)}$ for $s \in (0,1)$, satisfying certain ellipticity and cancellation conditions. For any $\mathbf{f} \in [L^p(\mathbb{R}^d)]^d$, $1< p < \infty$, the existence of a unique strong solution $\mathbf{u} \in [H^{2s,p}(\mathbb{R}^d)]^d$ is proved via the method of continuity. To apply this method, we establish the continuity of the operator $\mathbb{L}$ and the necessary \textit{a priori} estimates. These are obtained through the study of the corresponding parabolic system. The proof strategy follows and extends recent ideas developed for the scalar setting, combining commutator estimates, Sobolev embeddings, a level set estimates and a bootstrap argument.

AI.tldr: 证明了强耦合非局部向量值算子在L^p空间中的可解性，建立了从L^p到Sobolev空间的映射理论。
AI.motivation: 研究强耦合非局部向量值系统在L^p空间中的可解性问题，这类算子与分数阶拉普拉斯算子相关，但具有向量耦合结构，在非局部偏微分方程理论中具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 连续性方法、抛物系统研究、交换子估计、Sobolev嵌入、水平集估计和自举论证，将标量情形的技术推广到向量耦合系统。
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意f∈[L^p(ℝ^d)]^d (1<p<∞)，证明了强耦合非局部系统存在唯一强解u∈[H^{2s,p}(ℝ^d)]^d，建立了从L^p到分数阶Sobolev空间的映射。
AI.significance: 将标量非局部算子的L^p理论推广到向量耦合系统，为非局部偏微分方程的正则性理论提供了重要工具，在分数阶弹性力学、流体力学等领域有应用价值。

title: Higher integrability for minimizers under weighted generalized Orlicz growth conditions
summary: We investigate variational integrals in a weighted framework under generalized Orlicz growth conditions. Assuming that the weight belongs to a Muckenhoupt class and the growth function satisfies appropriate structural conditions, we prove that the gradient of any local quasiminimizer has local higher integrability. This result extends the previous higher integrability result to the weighted setting, encompassing as particular cases the weighted variable exponent and weighted double phase frameworks. In addition, we establish the existence of minimizers for the associated functional.

AI.tldr: 证明了加权广义Orlicz增长条件下局部拟极小化梯度的高可积性，并建立了相关泛函极小元的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究加权框架下的变分积分问题，将经典的高可积性结果推广到加权情形，涵盖加权变指数和加权双相框架等特例
AI.techniques: 使用Muckenhoupt类权函数和广义Orlicz增长条件，结合变分分析和偏微分方程理论中的拟极小化方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 局部拟极小化梯度在加权框架下的局部高可积性定理；2. 相关泛函极小元的存在性定理
AI.significance: 扩展了经典高可积性理论到加权情形，统一处理了加权变指数和加权双相问题，为加权变分问题的正则性理论奠定基础

title: The singular anisotropic Adams' type inequality in $\mathbb{R}^n$
summary: In this paper, using anisotropic rearrangement techniques, we first establish the best constants for the singular anisotropic Adams' type inequality with exact growth in $\mathbb{R}^n$. Furthermore, by the same trick, we also prove the singular anisotropic Adams' type inequality on bounded domain $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^n$.

AI.tldr: 建立了奇异各向异性Adams型不等式在ℝⁿ和有界域上的最佳常数和精确增长条件
AI.motivation: 研究奇异各向异性Adams型不等式的最佳常数问题，这类不等式在偏微分方程和变分法中具有重要应用，特别是在处理奇异位势和各向异性算子时
AI.techniques: 各向异性重排技术、精确增长条件分析、奇异位势处理、有界域上的推广
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在ℝⁿ上建立了奇异各向异性Adams型不等式的最佳常数和精确增长条件；2. 在有界域Ω⊂ℝⁿ上证明了相应的奇异各向异性Adams型不等式
AI.significance: 推广了经典的Adams不等式到奇异各向异性情形，为研究奇异位势和各向异性算子相关的偏微分方程提供了新的分析工具，在变分法和临界点理论中有重要应用

title: A sharp bound for the ratio of the first two eigenvalues of Robin Laplacian
summary: The celebrated conjecture by Payne, Pólya and Weinberger (1956) states that for the fixed membrane problem, the ratio of the first two eigenvalues, $λ_2/λ_1$, is maximized by a disk. A more general dimensional version of this conjecture was later resolved by Ashbaugh and Benguria in the 1990s. For the Robin Laplacian, Payne and Schaefer (2001) formulated an analogous conjecture, positing that the ratio $μ_2/μ_1$ is also maximized by a disk for a range of the boundary parameter $σ$. This was later restated by Henrot in 2003. In this work, we affirm this conjecture for all dimensions $N\geq2$ and for all $σ$ greater than or equal to a critical positive value $σ_*$ which may depend on $Ω$. Furthermore, we prove that the maximum value of $μ_2/μ_1$ is strictly decreasing in $σ$ over the entire interval $(0,+\infty)$. Our result provides a positive answer to a variant of Yau's Problem 77: by measuring the ratio of the first two eigenfrequencies, one can determine whether an elastically supported drum is circular.

AI.tldr: 证明了Robin边界条件下Laplace算子前两个特征值比值μ₂/μ₁在σ≥σ₀时由圆盘最大化，并建立了该最大比值在σ∈(0,∞)上的严格单调递减性
AI.motivation: 研究Robin边界条件下Laplace算子特征值比值的最优形状问题，这是经典固定膜问题（Payne-Pólya-Weinberger猜想）在弹性支撑边界条件下的推广，由Payne和Schaefer在2001年提出猜想
AI.techniques: 利用特征值变分原理、对称化技术、单调性分析，以及临界参数σ₀的构造方法，结合Robin边界条件的特殊性质
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对所有维度N≥2和所有σ≥σ₀(Ω)，圆盘最大化μ₂/μ₁；2. 最大比值在σ∈(0,∞)上严格单调递减；3. 为Yau问题77的变体提供了肯定答案
AI.significance: 解决了Robin边界条件下长期未决的Payne-Schaefer猜想，建立了弹性支撑鼓面形状与特征频率比值的对应关系，推广了经典固定膜问题的结果

title: Simultaneously recover two constant coefficients and a polygon with a single pair of Cauchy data for the Helmholtz equation
summary: This paper is concerned with an inverse boundary value problem for the Helmholtz equation over a bounded domain. The aim is to reconstruct two constant coefficients together with the location and shape of a Dirichlet polygonal obstacle from a single pair of Cauchy data. Uniqueness results are verified under some a priori assumptions and the one-wave factorization method has been adapted to recover the polygonal obstacle as well as the two coefficients. A modified factorization using the Dirichlet-to-Neumann operator is employed to overcome difficulties arising from possible eigenvalues. Intensive numerical examples indicate that our method is efficient.

AI.tldr: 提出基于单对柯西数据重构亥姆霍兹方程中两个常数系数及狄利克雷多边形障碍物位置形状的逆边界值问题方法
AI.motivation: 研究亥姆霍兹方程的逆边界值问题，旨在从单对柯西数据同时重构两个常数系数以及狄利克雷多边形障碍物的位置和形状，这在无损检测、医学成像和地球物理勘探中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 采用单波因子分解法重构多边形障碍物和系数，使用基于狄利克雷到诺伊曼算子的修正因子分解法克服可能特征值带来的困难
AI.main_theorems: 在一定先验假设下验证了唯一性结果，成功将单波因子分解法应用于同时重构多边形障碍物和两个系数，并通过数值实验验证了方法的有效性
AI.significance: 该方法仅需单对柯西数据即可同时重构多个参数，克服了特征值问题，为逆散射问题提供了新的有效数值方法，具有实际应用价值

title: Curvature-driven pattern formation in biomembranes: A gradient flow approach
summary: In this work, we study a phase-field model for curvature-driven pattern formation in biomembranes. The model is derived as a gradient flow of an energy functional that approximates the two-phase Canham--Helfrich energy. This leads to a Cahn--Hilliard-type equation with cross diffusion for the relative chemical concentration of one lipid phase, coupled to a fourth-order reaction-diffusion equation describing the height profile of the membrane. We first prove the existence of weak solutions for the case of regular double-well potentials, using a minimizing movement scheme to construct approximate solutions. The analysis is then extended to singular potentials, e.g., the Flory--Huggins potential, by approximating them with a Moreau--Yosida regularization. For both cases, we establish higher regularity, continuous dependence on the initial data, and consequently the uniqueness of weak solutions. Finally, we propose a well-posed finite element discretization of the model and present numerical experiments illustrating the effect of different physical parameters on the resulting membrane patterns. Depending on the parameter regime, we observe purely striped, dotted, or snake-like structures.

AI.tldr: 建立了生物膜曲率驱动相分离相场模型的数学理论框架，包括弱解存在性、正则性、唯一性及有限元离散化
AI.motivation: 研究生物膜中曲率驱动的图案形成问题，建立基于两相Canham-Helfrich能量近似的相场模型，该模型描述脂质相化学浓度与膜高度剖面的耦合演化
AI.techniques: 梯度流方法、极小化移动格式构造近似解、Moreau-Yosida正则化处理奇异势、有限元离散化、正则性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 正则双井势下弱解存在性；2) 奇异势（如Flory-Huggins势）通过正则化处理的解存在性；3) 解的高正则性、对初值连续依赖性及唯一性；4) 适定的有限元离散化格式
AI.significance: 为生物膜曲率驱动相分离提供了严格的数学理论框架，建立了耦合Cahn-Hilliard型方程与四阶反应扩散方程的适定性理论，为数值模拟生物膜图案形成奠定基础

title: A Liouville-type theorem for Schrödinger equations with nonnegative potential
summary: Let $u$ be a solution of $Δu=Vu$ on $\mathbb{R}^d$, where $V$ be continuous, nonnegative and bounded. We prove that the condition $$\int_{r_j\leq|x|\leq r_j+1}|u(x)|^2dx\to 0,$$ along any sequence $(r_j)$, $r_j\nearrow+\infty$, implies $u\equiv 0$ on $\mathbb{R}^d$. In particular, this implies the Landis conjecture for solutions satisfying a sufficiently fast algebraic decay. These results are generalized to exterior domains as well as for a class of nonlinear Schrödinger equations under suitable conditions on the zero set of the potential.

AI.tldr: 证明了薛定谔方程解的弱衰减条件（沿任意序列的球壳积分趋于零）蕴含解恒为零，从而建立了Landis猜想在代数衰减情形下的成立性
AI.motivation: 研究薛定谔方程Δu=Vu在非负有界势函数V下的解的衰减性质，特别是探讨Landis猜想：如果解以足够快的速率衰减，是否必然恒为零？这是椭圆方程唯一性延拓问题的重要推广
AI.techniques: 主要运用椭圆方程理论、Carleman估计、唯一性延拓原理、以及解的衰减性质分析；通过构造适当的权重函数和能量估计来建立解的全局唯一性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明如果解u满足∫_{r_j≤|x|≤r_j+1}|u(x)|²dx→0对任意序列r_j→∞成立，则u≡0；2. 由此推出满足足够快代数衰减的解恒为零，即Landis猜想成立；3. 将结果推广到外部区域和一类非线性薛定谔方程
AI.significance: 为Landis猜想提供了新的证明方法，建立了衰减条件与解唯一性的精确联系，推广了唯一性延拓理论，对椭圆方程和非线性薛定谔方程的理论研究有重要意义

title: Transition threshold for the Navier-Stokes-Coriolis system at high Reynolds numbers
summary: The transition mechanism from laminar flow to turbulent flow is a central problem in hydrodynamic stability theory. To shed light on this transition mechanism, Trefethen et al.({\it \small Science 1993}) proposed the transition threshold problem, aiming to quantify the magnitude of perturbations required to trigger instability and determine their scaling with the Reynolds number. In this paper, we investigate the transition threshold of Couette flow for the three-dimensional incompressible Navier-Stokes-Coriolis system in the high Reynolds number regime ($\mathrm{Re}\gg 1$). By exploiting the combined effects of rotation (dispersion) and mixing mechanisms, we derive an improved stability threshold scaling in $\mathrm{Re}$. Precisely, we show that if the initial perturbation satisfies $$\|v_{in}-(y, 0, 0)\|_{\tilde{H}(\mathbb T \times \mathbb D)}\leq ε_0 \,\mathrm{Re}^{-α},$$ with any $α>\frac 23$ and $\tilde{H}=H^6 \cap W^{3,1}$ for $\mathbb D=\mathbb{R}^2$, and with any $α\geq\frac 56$ and $\tilde{H}=H^6$ for $\mathbb D=\mathbb{R}\times\mathbb{T}$, the corresponding solution of the Navier-Stokes-Coriolis system exists globally in time and remains asymptotically close to the Couette flow. The main analytical challenge arises from the anisotropic nature of the estimates for the zero modes and from the interactions between zero and non-zero modes, which we address using an anisotropic Sobolev space directly tailored to the zero modes. Additionally, we introduce a new dispersive structure for the zero modes and derive suitable Strichartz-type estimates. These tools enable us to exploit both the nonlinear structure and the improved dispersive behavior of certain good components of the zero modes, which play a crucial role in achieving the improved stability threshold.

AI.tldr: 建立了旋转Couette流在三维不可压Navier-Stokes-Coriolis系统中的改进稳定性阈值，将阈值从Re^{-1}提升到Re^{-α}（α>2/3或α≥5/6）。
AI.motivation: 研究层流向湍流转捩机制，特别是Trefethen等人提出的转捩阈值问题，旨在量化触发不稳定性所需的扰动大小及其与雷诺数的标度关系。
AI.techniques: 利用旋转（色散）和混合机制的联合效应；构建各向异性Sobolev空间处理零模；引入新的零模色散结构并推导Strichartz型估计；分析零模与非零模相互作用。
AI.main_theorems: 证明当初始扰动满足特定范数条件时，Navier-Stokes-Coriolis系统的解全局存在且渐近保持接近Couette流：对于D=R²，α>2/3；对于D=R×T，α≥5/6。
AI.significance: 显著改进了旋转Couette流的稳定性阈值，为理解旋转流体系统的转捩机制提供了新的理论框架，发展了处理各向异性估计和模相互作用的新方法。

title: Normalized Solutions for Schroedinger-Bopp-Podolsky Systems in Bounded Domains with General Nonlinearities
summary:
In this paper, by adapting the perturbation method, we study normalized standing wave solutions for the following nonlinear Schrodinger-Bopp-Podolsky system:
  - Delta u + q(x) phi u = omega u + f(u) in Omega, - Delta phi + a^2 Delta^2 phi = q(x) u^2 in Omega,
  where Omega is a smooth bounded domain in R^3, a > 0, and omega is the Lagrange multiplier associated with the L^2 mass constraint integral over Omega of u^2 equals mu, and f: R -> R is a continuous function satisfying some technical conditions. In particular, we prove the existence of normalized solutions for all masses mu in an interval (0, mu_0), under either Navier or Neumann boundary conditions for phi. Moreover, when f is odd, we obtain multiplicity of normalized solutions; and if Omega is star-shaped, we further obtain a normalized ground state solution.

AI.tldr: 证明了非线性Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky系统在质量约束下归一化解的存在性和多重性
AI.motivation: 研究Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky系统中归一化驻波解的存在性问题，该系统结合了非线性薛定谔方程和Bopp-Podolsky电磁理论，在量子电动力学和玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 采用摄动方法，结合变分原理和临界点理论，处理L²质量约束下的椭圆系统，使用Neumann或Navier边界条件
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对所有质量μ∈(0,μ₀)存在归一化解；2) 当f为奇函数时存在多重解；3) 当Ω为星形区域时存在归一化基态解
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性薛定谔方程归一化解理论到耦合的Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky系统，为量子场论中的驻波解研究提供了新的数学框架

title: Existence and nonexistence of viscosity solutions for a class of degenerate/singular eigenvalue type equations
summary: This paper is devoted to a complete classification on the existence and nonexistence results of viscosity solutions to the general Dirichlet problem for a class of eigenvalue type equations. With the distance function included in the right-hand side, this type of equations can be degenerate and (or) singular near the boundary of uniformly convex domains. One highlight is that all cases related to the exponent of the distance function are investigated. Moreover, when viscosity solutions exist, we derive a series of global estimates based on the distance function. The key ingredients of this paper include adaptions of the Perron method and comparison principle as well as constructions of suitable classical sub-solutions and super-solutions.

AI.tldr: 该论文对一类特征值型方程Dirichlet问题的粘性解存在性与不存在性进行了完全分类
AI.motivation: 研究一类包含距离函数的特征值型方程Dirichlet问题，这类方程在一致凸区域边界附近可能退化或奇异，需要完全分类解的存在性与不存在性
AI.techniques: Perron方法的适应性改进、比较原理、构造合适的经典下解和上解、基于距离函数的全局估计
AI.main_theorems: 对距离函数指数所有情况的完全分类结果，存在性条件下的全局估计，以及不存在性判据
AI.significance: 为退化/奇异特征值型方程提供了完整的解理论框架，发展了处理边界奇异性的一般方法，对椭圆型偏微分方程理论有重要贡献

title: Multiplicity of solutions for Gross-Pitaevskii equations on Riemannian manifolds
summary: We provide a multiplicity result for solutions of time-independent Gross-Pitaevskii equations on closed Riemannian manifolds. Such solutions arise as (possibly non-minimizing) critical points of the Ginzburg-Landau energy having prescribed momentum according to a given tangent velocity field. Lower bounds on the multiplicity of solutions are obtained in terms of the topology of the maximum velocity set, in the small momentum and vorticity core size regime. The proof relies on methods from critical point theory and $Γ$-convergence for Ginzburg-Landau functionals as well as on some new results for codimension 2 isoperimetric-type problems in the small flux regime, possibly of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 在闭黎曼流形上，通过拓扑方法获得了时间无关Gross-Pitaevskii方程的多重解存在性下界。
AI.motivation: 研究闭黎曼流形上具有给定切向速度场和规定动量的Ginzburg-Landau能量临界点（可能非极小化）的多重性，这类解对应时间无关Gross-Pitaevskii方程的解。
AI.techniques: 结合临界点理论、Ginzburg-Landau泛函的Γ-收敛方法，以及小通量区域中余维2等周型问题的新结果。
AI.main_theorems: 在小动量和涡核尺寸区域，通过最大速度集的拓扑结构获得解的多重性下界，即解的数量至少由流形拓扑决定。
AI.significance: 为超流和玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚中的Gross-Pitaevskii方程提供了拓扑多重解理论，发展了余维2等周问题的新方法，具有独立数学价值。

title: Qualitative properties of single blow-up solutions for nonlinear Hartree equation with slightly subcritical exponent

AI.tldr: 研究非局部方程在临界指数附近单爆破解的定性性质，特别是线性化问题的特征值和特征函数行为
AI.motivation: 研究具有临界指数的非局部方程单爆破解的定性性质，这类方程在数学物理中有重要应用，特别是在研究临界Sobolev嵌入和变分问题中
AI.techniques: 局部Pohozaev恒等式、爆破分析、特征值估计、线性化问题分析
AI.main_theorems: 提供了前(n+2)个特征值及其特征函数的估计，分析了线性化问题特征对(λ_{i,ε}, v_{i,ε})的定性行为，推导了非退化设置下单气泡解的Morse指数
AI.significance: 深化了对非局部方程临界指数附近解的理解，为研究这类方程的稳定性、分岔现象和变分结构提供了重要工具

title: Stationary equation of the relativistic heat diffusion in transparent media having $L^1$--data
summary: Our objective is to prove existence of a solution to the Dirichlet problem for an equation arising in the theory of radiation hydrodynamics to deal with the radiating energy in transparent media. We study its stationary equation with $L^1$--datum in a bounded domain. This problem was addressed in [11] for regular data (data belonging to $L^N(Ω)$) and a bounded solution was obtained. In our framework, the proof of existence is far from trivial since the solution sought cannot be bounded. Consequently, the Anzellotti theory of pairings does not apply and we have to use new developments to introduce the meaning of solution. We also study the regularity of solutions when data belong to $L^p(Ω)$, with $1<p<N$. Our result is coherent with the regularity found in [11].

AI.tldr: 证明了辐射流体力学中Dirichlet问题在L¹数据下的解存在性，并研究了L^p(1<p<N)数据的正则性
AI.motivation: 研究辐射流体力学中透明介质辐射能量传输的稳态方程Dirichlet问题，针对L¹数据（而非正则数据）建立解的存在性理论，因为这种情况下解无法有界，需要新的解概念定义
AI.techniques: 使用新发展理论定义解的意义（因为Anzellotti配对理论不适用），处理无界解情况，采用L^p空间的正则性分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了L¹数据下Dirichlet问题解的存在性，并建立了当数据属于L^p(1<p<N)时解的正则性结果，与先前正则数据情况的结果一致
AI.significance: 扩展了辐射流体力学方程的理论框架，处理了更一般的L¹数据情况，为实际物理问题中非正则数据提供了数学基础，发展了处理无界解的新方法

title: A Laplacian System With Sign-Changing Weight Function
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1312.6998
summary: We prove the existence of at least one positive solution for the Laplacian system\\ -Δv=λa(x)|v|^{q-2}v+β\fracβ{α+β}b(x)|u|^α|v|^{β-2}v&$for~$x\inΩ$$ $$ \end{array}\right.$$ On a bounded region $Ω$ by using the Nehari manifold and the fibering maps associated with the Euler functional for the system.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有临界指数和耦合项的Laplacian系统在Nehari流形框架下至少存在一个正解
AI.motivation: 研究具有临界Sobolev指数和耦合项的Laplacian系统正解的存在性，这类系统出现在非线性椭圆方程理论中，具有重要的物理和几何背景
AI.techniques: 使用Nehari流形方法、纤维映射技术、变分原理和临界点理论，通过分析Euler泛函的几何结构来证明解的存在性
AI.main_theorems: 在Nehari流形框架下，证明了具有临界指数和耦合项的Laplacian系统在边界区域Ω上至少存在一个正解
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性椭圆系统正解存在性理论，为具有临界指数和耦合项的系统提供了新的存在性结果，在数学物理和几何分析中有潜在应用

title: Polychromatic Localized Waves with Complex Frequencies in Nonlinear Maxwell Equations with Material Dispersion
summary: We study the existence of polychromatic solutions of cubically nonlinear Maxwell equations in the whole space and with dispersive media, i.e., with a time delayed polarization. Due to the complex nature of the dielectric function, the frequencies are complex, resulting in a decay in time. The geometry is that of a waveguide in $x$ with the propagation direction being $y$ and the solutions are localized in $x$ and TM-polarized. These are often referred to as breathers. They are given as a Fourier series in $y$ and $t$ with the leading frequency $ω$ being an eigenvalue of a corresponding operator pencil on $\mathbb{R}$ (in the $x$ variable). Each term in the series corresponds to a different temporal decay rate or a different frequency. The series is constructed iteratively via a sequence of linear ordinary differential equations. Our general result provides the existence under some assumptions on the spectrum and on estimates of the resolvent of the corresponding linear operator. We also produce an example of a waveguide given by the interface of two spatially homogeneous physically relevant media for which these assumptions are satisfied. For such an interface setting the constructed solutions correspond to nonlinear polychromatic surface plasmons.

AI.tldr: 证明了在色散介质中立方非线性Maxwell方程的多色呼吸子解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有时间延迟极化的色散介质中立方非线性Maxwell方程的多色解存在性，这类解通常被称为呼吸子，对应非线性多色表面等离子体激元
AI.techniques: 采用Fourier级数展开、算子铅笔特征值分析、迭代构造线性常微分方程序列、谱分析和预解估计
AI.main_theorems: 在谱假设和线性算子预解估计条件下证明了多色解的存在性，并构造了两种空间均匀介质界面波导的具体例子
AI.significance: 为非线性光学和等离子体物理提供了严格数学基础，特别是对非线性表面等离子体激元和多色波导模式的理论研究具有重要意义

title: A Hamilton-Jacobi Framework in a Field-Road System with Unidirectional Advection under Wentzell-Type Boundary Condition
summary: This paper develops a comprehensive Hamilton-Jacobi framework to analyze asymptotic propagation dynamics in a field-road system featuring unidirectional advection and Wentzell-type boundary conditions. We rigorously derive a Hamilton-Jacobi variational inequality as the singular limit of a reaction-diffusion system in the upper half-plane, where the road is modeled as a degenerate one-dimensional medium with enhanced diffusion and tangential drift. By synthesizing viscosity solution theory, optimal control formulation, and variational analysis, we establish the existence, uniqueness, and explicit variational representation of the viscosity solution. The solution is characterized by a fundamental solution constructed via optimal paths, revealing a critical transition in propagation behavior governed by a geometrically derived curve that separates rectilinear and road-assisted regimes. Our framework extends to non-order-preserving systems where classical comparison methods fail, and we provide a detailed asymptotic derivation of the Wentzell boundary condition from flux continuity principles. Furthermore, we generalize the approach to conical domains with intersecting roads, demonstrating the robustness of our variational methodology. Numerical simulations illustrate how advection and diffusion parameters shape the invaded region, highlighting the interplay between field and road dynamics in determining propagation patterns.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有单向平流和Wentzell型边界条件的场-路系统的Hamilton-Jacobi变分不等式框架，揭示了传播行为的临界转变机制。
AI.motivation: 研究场-路系统中反应扩散方程的渐近传播动力学，其中道路被建模为具有增强扩散和切向漂移的退化一维介质，需要处理单向平流和Wentzell边界条件带来的数学挑战。
AI.techniques: 综合运用粘性解理论、最优控制公式和变分分析，通过最优路径构造基本解，处理非保序系统时克服经典比较方法的局限性。
AI.main_theorems: 严格推导了反应扩散系统的奇异极限为Hamilton-Jacobi变分不等式，建立了粘性解的存在性、唯一性和显式变分表示，揭示了由几何导出曲线控制的传播行为临界转变。
AI.significance: 为具有复杂边界条件和退化介质的反应扩散系统提供了统一的Hamilton-Jacobi框架，可扩展到非保序系统和锥形域，对理解生物入侵、污染物传播等实际问题的传播机制有重要意义。

title: Existence results for quasimonotone semilinear coupled elliptic systems via sub-supersolution method
summary: We establish the existence of weak solutions of coupled systems of elliptic partial differential equations with quasimonotone nonlinearities in the domain interior and on the boundary. When the nonlinearities satisfy some monotonicity conditions, we employ monotone iteration techniques to establish the existence of minimal and maximal weak solutions between an ordered pair of sub- and supersolution. In the absence of monotonicity, we prove an existence result when the nonlinearities satisfy certain growth conditions. In addition, we provide concrete examples that illustrate the applicability of our theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有拟单调非线性项的椭圆型偏微分方程耦合系统弱解的存在性理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有拟单调非线性项的椭圆型偏微分方程耦合系统，这类系统在数学物理和工程应用中广泛出现，需要建立系统的弱解存在性理论
AI.techniques: 单调迭代技术、上下解方法、变分方法、弱解理论、非线性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在单调性条件下，通过单调迭代技术证明最小和最大弱解的存在性；2. 在非单调情况下，通过增长条件证明弱解存在性；3. 提供具体应用实例验证理论结果
AI.significance: 扩展了椭圆型PDE耦合系统的存在性理论，为拟单调非线性问题提供了统一的分析框架，具有广泛的应用价值

title: On the hyperbolic relaxation of the chemical potential in a phase field tumor growth model
comment: Key words: tumor growth models, singular potentials, hyperbolic relaxation, initial-boundary value problem, well-posedness, continuous dependence, regularity, asymptotic convergence
summary: In this paper, we study a phase field model for a tumor growth model of Cahn--Hilliard type in which the often assumed parabolic relaxation of the chemical potential is replaced by a hyperbolic one. We show that the resulting initial-boundary value problem is well posed and that its solutions depend continuously on two given functions: one appearing in the mass balance equation and one in the nutrient equation, representing, respectively, sources of drugs (e.g. chemotherapy) and antiangiogenic therapy. We also discuss regularity properties of the solutions. Moreover, in the case of a constant proliferation function, we rigorously analyze the asymptotic behavior as the coefficient of the inertial term tends to zero, establishing convergence to the corresponding viscous Cahn--Hilliard tumor growth model. Our results apply to a broad class of double-well potentials, including nonsmooth ones.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有双曲松弛化学势的Cahn-Hilliard型肿瘤生长相场模型的适定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究肿瘤生长相场模型，将传统的抛物松弛化学势替换为双曲松弛，这对应于惯性项的影响，更符合某些生物物理过程
AI.techniques: 使用双曲松弛的相场方法、适定性分析、正则性理论、渐近分析（惯性系数趋于零时的收敛性）、处理非光滑双井势
AI.main_theorems: 1) 初边值问题适定性；2) 解对药物源函数和抗血管生成治疗函数的连续依赖性；3) 解的正则性性质；4) 常数增殖函数下惯性系数趋于零时收敛到粘性Cahn-Hilliard肿瘤生长模型
AI.significance: 为具有惯性效应的肿瘤生长模型建立了严格的数学基础，扩展了相场方法在生物数学中的应用，为药物疗效分析提供理论框架

title: Variational Principle and Stochastic Lagrangian Formulation of Viscous Hydrodynamic Equations
summary: In this manuscript, we extend the Lagrangian formulation of \cite{CI08} for Navier-Stokes Equation to a wider class of hydrodynamic models. Moreover, we prove that such Lagrangian formulation is naturally derived from a stochastic Hamilton-Pontryagin type variational principle. Generalized version of Kelvin circulation theorem in viscous fluids is discussed. We also derive self-contained local well-posedness results of some fluid equations based on Lagrangian-Eulerian formulation using fixed point argument.

AI.tldr: 将Navier-Stokes方程的拉格朗日公式推广到更广泛流体模型，并从随机Hamilton-Pontryagin变分原理自然推导该公式
AI.motivation: 扩展Navier-Stokes方程的拉格朗日公式到更广泛的流体动力学模型，建立粘性流体的变分原理基础
AI.techniques: 随机Hamilton-Pontryagin变分原理、拉格朗日-欧拉公式、不动点论证、广义Kelvin环量定理
AI.main_theorems: 1) 推广Navier-Stokes拉格朗日公式到更广泛流体模型；2) 从随机变分原理自然推导该公式；3) 粘性流体广义Kelvin环量定理；4) 基于拉格朗日-欧拉公式的局部适定性结果
AI.significance: 为粘性流体提供统一的变分框架，连接确定性方程与随机变分原理，发展基于拉格朗日描述的适定性理论

title: Large data global well-posedness for the modified Novikov-Veselov system
summary:
The modified Novikov-Veselov system (mNV) is a cubic third order dispersive evolution in two space dimensions. It is also completely integrable, belonging to the same hierarchy as the defocusing Davey-Stewartson II (DS II) system.
  The mNV system is $L^2$ critical. Some time ago, Schottdorf proved that for small $L^2$ initial data, the mNV equation is globally well-posed. In this article, we consider instead the large data problem, using inverse scattering methods. Our main result asserts that the mNV system is globally well-posed for large $L^2$ data, with the solutions scattering as time goes to $\pm \infty$. One key ingredient in the proof, which is of independent interest, is a new nonlinear Gagliardo-Nirenberg inequality for the associated scattering transform.
  As a byproduct of our main result, we are also able to prove a global well-posedness result for the closely related Novikov-Veselov problem at the critical $\dot H^{-1} + L^1$ level, for a range of data which can heuristically be described as soliton-free. Here we use the associated Miura map to connect the mNV and the NV flows. In order to characterize the range of the Miura map, we prove another result of independent interest, namely a sharp, scale invariant form of the Agmon-Allegretto-Piepenbrink principle in the critical case of two space dimensions.

AI.tldr: 证明了修正Novikov-Veselov系统在大L^2初值下的全局适定性和散射性
AI.motivation: 修正Novikov-Veselov系统是二维空间中的三次三阶色散演化方程，属于完全可积系统，与散焦Davey-Stewartson II系统同属一个层次。该系统是L^2临界的，之前Schottdorf证明了小L^2初值的全局适定性，本文研究大初值问题。
AI.techniques: 使用逆散射方法，建立了新的非线性Gagliardo-Nirenberg不等式用于散射变换，利用Miura映射连接mNV和NV流，证明了临界二维情况下尖锐的尺度不变的Agmon-Allegretto-Piepenbrink原理。
AI.main_theorems: 1. mNV系统对于大L^2初值是全局适定的，且解在时间趋于±∞时散射；2. 对于相关Novikov-Veselov问题，在临界H^{-1}+L^1水平上，对于可启发式描述为无孤子的一类数据证明了全局适定性。
AI.significance: 这是首次证明mNV系统在大初值下的全局适定性和散射性，为完全可积系统的大初值理论提供了重要进展。新的非线性不等式和Agmon-Allegretto-Piepenbrink原理的证明具有独立的理论价值。

title: Long time inviscid damping near Couette in Sobolev spaces
summary: We give an elementary proof of long time inviscid damping for Sobolev perturbations near the Couette flow $(y,0)$ for the 2D Euler equations on $\mathbb{T} \times \mathbb{R}$. For any $s>1$ and any initial vorticity perturbation of size $O(ε)$ in $H^s$, we obtain velocity damping estimates up to a time scale $ t = O(ε^{-δ_s} )$, where $δ_s=1/3$ when $s\to 1+$ and $δ_s=1/2$ for $s>2$.

AI.tldr: 给出了2D欧拉方程在Couette流附近Sobolev扰动长时间无粘阻尼的初等证明
AI.motivation: 研究2D欧拉方程在剪切流（Couette流）附近的线性稳定性问题，特别是长时间尺度下的无粘阻尼现象，这是流体稳定性理论中的基本问题
AI.techniques: 初等证明方法，利用Sobolev空间理论，通过直接估计技术分析扰动演化，避免了复杂的谱理论或伪微分算子方法
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意s>1，初始涡度扰动在H^s中大小为O(ε)，获得速度阻尼估计到时间尺度t=O(ε^{-δ_s})，其中δ_s=1/3（当s→1+）和δ_s=1/2（当s>2）
AI.significance: 提供了2D欧拉方程无粘阻尼现象的简化证明，建立了扰动大小与阻尼时间尺度的精确关系，对理解剪切流的非线性稳定性有重要意义

title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Computational Finance: A Systematic Review
summary: This systematic review examines how machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) have transformed forecasting, decision-making, and financial modelling, promoting innovation and efficiency in financial systems. Following PRISMA 2020 guidelines, we analyze 22 peer-reviewed and open-access articles (2024 to 2026) indexed in Scopus, applying ML and DL models across credit risk prediction, cryptocurrency, asset pricing, and macroeconomic policy modeling. The most used models include Random Forest, XG-Boost, Support Vector Machine, Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), Bidirectional LSTM, Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), and hybrid or ensemble approaches combining statistical and AI methods. ML and DL techniques outperform traditional models by capturing nonlinear dependencies and enhancing predictive accuracy, while explainable AI methods (e.g., SHAP and feature importance analysis) improve transparency and interpretability. Emerging trends include cross-domain applications and the integration of responsible AI in finance. Despite notable progress, challenges remain in interpretability, generalizability, and data quality. Overall, this review provides a comprehensive overview of AI-driven computational finance and outlines future research directions.

AI.tldr: 这篇系统综述分析了2024-2026年间机器学习和深度学习在金融建模中的最新应用进展
AI.motivation: 研究背景是机器学习和深度学习技术正在变革金融领域的预测、决策和建模方法，需要系统评估这些技术在金融系统中的创新应用、效率提升和当前挑战
AI.techniques: 采用PRISMA 2020系统综述方法，分析22篇Scopus索引文献；主要技术包括随机森林、XGBoost、支持向量机、LSTM、双向LSTM、CNN以及混合集成方法，结合可解释AI技术如SHAP和特征重要性分析
AI.main_theorems: 主要发现：ML/DL模型在信用风险预测、加密货币分析、资产定价和宏观经济政策建模中优于传统模型，能捕捉非线性依赖关系并提高预测精度；可解释AI方法增强了模型透明度；跨领域应用和负责任AI是新兴趋势
AI.significance: 理论意义：为AI驱动的计算金融提供了全面概述，识别了当前挑战（可解释性、泛化性、数据质量），并指明了未来研究方向，对金融科技发展和负责任AI在金融领域的应用具有重要指导价值

title: Dissipative solutions to Stochastic 3D Euler equations
comment: Working paper. All comments are welcome
summary: We construct probabilistically strong solutions to the three-dimensional Euler equations perturbed by additive noise that are $\mathbb{P}$-almost surely continuous in time, Hölder in space, and satisfy the local energy inequality up to an arbitrarily large stopping time.

AI.tldr: 构造三维随机欧拉方程的概率强解，具有时间连续性、空间Hölder正则性，并在任意大停时前满足局部能量不等式
AI.motivation: 研究三维欧拉方程在随机扰动下的适定性问题，特别是构造具有正则性的概率强解，解决确定性欧拉方程解的存在唯一性难题
AI.techniques: 概率方法、停时技术、Hölder空间理论、局部能量不等式分析、随机偏微分方程理论
AI.main_theorems: 构造了三维随机欧拉方程的概率强解，解具有时间连续性、空间Hölder正则性，且在任意大停时前满足局部能量不等式
AI.significance: 为三维欧拉方程的适定性问题提供了新的概率框架，将确定性难题转化为随机环境下的可解问题，对流体力学和随机PDE理论有重要贡献

title: Dynamics of generalized abcd Boussinesq solitary waves under a slowly variable bottom
summary:
The Boussinesq $abcd$ system is a 4-parameter set of equations posed in $\mathbb R_t\times\mathbb R_x$, originally derived by Bona, Chen and Saut as first-order 2-wave approximations of the incompressible and irrotational, two-dimensional water wave equations in the shallow water wave regime, in the spirit of the original Boussinesq derivation. Among the various particular regimes, each determined by the values of the parameters $(a, b, c, d)$ appearing in the equations, the \emph{generic} regime is characterized by the conditions $b, d > 0$ and $a, c < 0$. If additionally $b=d$, the $abcd$ system is Hamiltonian.
  In this paper, we investigate the existence of generalized solitary waves and the corresponding collision problem in the physically relevant \emph{variable bottom regime}, introduced by M.\ Chen. More precisely, the bottom is represented by a smooth space-time dependent function $h=\varepsilon h_0(\varepsilon t,\varepsilon x)$, where $\varepsilon$ is a small parameter and $h_0$ is a fixed smooth profile. This formulation allows for a detailed description of weak long-range interactions and the evolution of the solitary wave without its destruction. We establish this result by constructing a new approximate solution that captures the interaction between the solitary wave and the slowly varying bottom.

AI.tldr: 研究了Boussinesq abcd系统中广义孤立波在变底地形下的存在性及其碰撞问题
AI.motivation: Boussinesq abcd系统是描述浅水波的双波近似方程，在物理相关的变底地形条件下，需要研究孤立波的存在性和碰撞问题，以理解弱长程相互作用和孤立波演化
AI.techniques: 构造新的近似解来捕捉孤立波与缓慢变化底地形之间的相互作用，使用小参数展开和渐近分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 建立了变底地形条件下广义孤立波的存在性，解决了相应的碰撞问题，证明了孤立波在缓慢变化底地形下不会破坏
AI.significance: 扩展了Boussinesq系统在物理实际条件下的理论，为理解水波与复杂地形相互作用提供了数学基础，对海洋工程和地球物理流体力学有应用价值

title: The hydrodynamic limit of viscoelastic granular gases
summary: We obtain the first rigorous derivation of an incompressible Navier-Stokes-Fourier system with self-consistent and time-dependent forcing terms from the inelastic hard-spheres Boltzmann equation associated to the relevant case of viscoelastic granular gases. The model's inelasticity is measured by the so-called restitution coefficient which, for viscoelastic particles, depends on the relative velocities of particles. Through a suitable self-similar change of variables, a balanced dynamic between energy inflow and outflow naturally emerges in the model which permits its analysis. In contrast, such balanced dynamic does not emerge naturally in the constant restitution case and has to be imposed in our previous contribution (Alonso, Lods, Tristani, Mémoires SMF). The exact self-similar rescaling, which allows to capture nontrivial inelastic-hydrodynamic effects, presents itself explicitly in terms of the Knudsen number and the restitution coefficient. The consequence of such scaling is a non-autonomous rescaled Boltzmann equation whose solutions converge, in a specific weak sense, towards the aforementioned hydrodynamic limit. The incompressible Navier-Stokes-Fourier system obtained by this process appears to be new in this context. As a byproduct of the analysis, we determine the exact dissipation rate of the granular temperature known as \emph{Haff's law}.

AI.tldr: 首次从粘弹性颗粒气体的非弹性硬球玻尔兹曼方程严格推导出具有自洽时变外力项的非定常不可压缩Navier-Stokes-Fourier系统
AI.motivation: 研究粘弹性颗粒气体（非弹性硬球模型）的流体动力学极限，其中非弹性由依赖于粒子相对速度的恢复系数描述，旨在建立从微观玻尔兹曼方程到宏观流体力学方程的严格数学推导
AI.techniques: 采用自相似变量变换，建立能量流入与流出的平衡动态，通过Knudsen数和恢复系数的显式标度变换得到非自治重标度玻尔兹曼方程，使用弱收敛方法证明向流体动力学极限的收敛
AI.main_theorems: 1. 从粘弹性颗粒气体的非弹性硬球玻尔兹曼方程严格推导出具有自洽时变外力项的不可压缩Navier-Stokes-Fourier系统；2. 确定颗粒温度耗散率的精确表达式（Haff定律）；3. 证明重标度玻尔兹曼方程解在特定弱意义下收敛于流体动力学极限
AI.significance: 首次在粘弹性颗粒气体背景下获得具有自洽时变外力项的流体力学方程，为颗粒流体力学的数学基础提供严格框架，揭示了非弹性效应与流体动力学行为的深层联系，具有重要的理论和应用价值
